description: India Book III,1: Business letter from Yosef b. Avraham, in Aden, to Avraham Ibn Yiju, on the Malabar coast of India. Dating: ca. 1137–40. The letter goes into detail regarding the various dealings between the two merchants. The letter contains, among the mention of many other copper items, a very detailed description of a copper lamp that Yosef asks Avraham to make for him in his copper workshop in India.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מעדן. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
